/usr/bin/ar qc libspine-c.a "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Animation.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/AnimationState.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/AtlasAttachmentLoader.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Attachment.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/AttachmentLoader.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Bone.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/BoneData.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/BoundingBoxAttachment.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/ClippingAttachment.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Color.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Debug.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Event.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/EventData.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/IkConstraint.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/IkConstraintData.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Json.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/MeshAttachment.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/PathAttachment.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/PathConstraint.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/PathConstraintData.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/PhysicsConstraint.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/PhysicsConstraintData.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/PointAttachment.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/RegionAttachment.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Sequence.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Skeleton.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/SkeletonBinary.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/SkeletonBounds.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/SkeletonClipping.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/SkeletonData.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/SkeletonJson.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Skin.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Slot.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/SlotData.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/TransformConstraint.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/TransformConstraintData.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/Triangulator.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/VertexAttachment.c.o" "CMakeFiles/spine-c.dir/spine-c/src/spine/extension.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libspine-c.a
